about: I'm Mustafiz Khan, a B.Tech CSE-AIML student from Karnataka, India. I'm passionate about Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, and full-stack development. My goal is to build intelligent systems that solve real-world problems. I actively learn through platforms like DeepLearning.AI, Hugging Face, fast.ai, and Karpathy's Neural Networks: Zero to Hero series.

projects.name: Portfolio Website v2
projects.description: A modern, responsive personal portfolio website showcasing my journey as a CSE-AIML student. Built with Next.js and TypeScript for performance and type-safety. Features smooth animations, project showcase, skills section, and an AI-powered chat agent.
highlights: AI chat agent powered by RAG

projects.name: Sarathi – Advanced Women Safety Transportation Platform
projects.description: Designed a women-focused smart transportation and cab safety solution inspired by ride-hailing platforms.
highlights: Integrated safety-oriented concepts including location tracking, emergency response mechanisms, and enhanced passenger security.
Focused on leveraging modern technology to improve transportation safety and trust.

projects.name: Smart Traffic Congestion Predictor
projects.description: Developed a Machine Learning-based traffic prediction system.
highlights: Utilized historical traffic data and predictive analytics techniques.
Aimed to forecast congestion levels and assist in efficient route planning.

projects.name: Payflow – Personal Finance Management Application
projects.description: Building a finance management application for tracking expenses, income, and savings.
highlights: Designed budgeting and financial monitoring features.
Focused on improving personal financial awareness and management.

education.field: Computer Science and Engineering — Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning (CSE-AIML)

achievements: Researched and publicly exposed ClinchEdge (clinchedge.com) as a pay-to-intern scam, helping fellow Indian students avoid fraud
Actively building a self-study path from Python basics to LLMs, APIs, and advanced machine learning
Studying on platforms including DeepLearning.AI, Hugging Face, fast.ai, and Anthropic Academy
Built a full-stack portfolio with an AI-powered RAG chat agent from scratch
Linux for Beginners — Infosys Springboard — Completed

contact.availability: Open to internships, collaborations, and freelance AI/ML projects

interests: Large Language Models and Agentic AI
Full-stack web development with AI features
